title: Charge Indicators for Bows and Crossbows
description: Simple animations for the bow and crossbow showing the charge with colors.
body:
### Very useful resource pack, it should work well in all versions but maybe 1.16.5+
If you see an "uncompatible for this version" (or smth like that) message it doesn't matter.

_Resourcepack showcase:_
![bowshowcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a078d83374d0f5805493089ebb2af7c66ac338f7.gif)
![crossbowshowcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29056af0cad8ad837f216969f1cc27ccc3447dc1.gif)
